candidate_definition_hints.text: CC0 SVG Map Icons, mirror of repo on Gitlab

A collection of 150+ clean high quality SVG map icons licensed under [CC0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/) (Public Domain) and also available as [icon font](https://github.com/gmgeo/osmic/tree/master/font), which is licensed under [SIL OFL](http://scripts.sil…
